data.content: 1. Required sanity gate failed: 'make sanity' exits non-zero in coverage because cargo tarpaulin reports '95.00% < 95.00%', so implementation_review cannot approve this branch. 2. Code review against the knot description found the behavior change itself is aligned: terminal cascade approval now ignores descendants already in any terminal state, matching cascade execution behavior, and added unit/CLI coverage covers all-terminal and mixed active/terminal cases. 3. No invariants were provided for this knot, and no security or regression issue was identified beyond the failing coverage gate.
